'''Lon Secura''' was [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura's]] uncle, [[Pol Secura]]'s brother and [[Nat Secura]]'s father. He was also the [[Clan Chief]] of the influential [[Clan Secura]] following Pol's [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Biography==
[[File:LonSecuraKharisFenn-SW1998-44.jpg|thumb|left|Lon Secura with [[Kh'aris Fenn]]]]
After his brother died, who was in the [[Twi'lek Ruling Council|Twi'lek Clan Council]], Secura tried to trace the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Ro Fenn]]. Following the Twi'lek traditions, Fenn was to walk the [[Bright Lands]], but Fenn hid himself very well. The exiled Twi'lek [[Kh'aris Fenn]] came back to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and demanded that he would become the new ruler of Ryloth. To emphasize this he let two [[Morgukai]] kidnap Lon's son, and heir of the Securas, Nat. Lon considered his surrender to Kh'aris in love for his son, but then a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] called [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] entered his estate in name of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. He told Lon to do nothing until he heard from the Jedi. After one day, his son was returned safely. The Jedi succeeded.
